summary: Completed comprehensive testing of P1 Feature: Attack Chain Execution Engine. All 11 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI fully functional after fixing a bug where manual step execution was using wrong execution ID field. Auto-execute mode, manual step execution, progress tracking, and step status transitions all working correctly.

bugs_fixed.issue: Manual step execution [RUN] buttons were sending 'undefined' as execution_id because code used chainExecution.id but API returns execution_id

passed_tests: POST /api/chains/execute with auto_execute=true - starts background execution, returns execution_id, total_steps, step_statuses
GET /api/chains/execution/{id} - tracks progress with step_statuses showing running/completed per step
POST /api/chains/execute with auto_execute=false - creates execution in 'ready' state
POST /api/chains/execution/{id}/step/{step_id} - manually executes a specific step, returns results
Chain execution completes with status=completed and progress=100
Step statuses update from pending->running->completed during auto execution
Frontend CHAINS tab - shows all 6 chains list
Frontend CHAINS tab - clicking chain shows details with steps, context inputs, PREPARE and AUTO-EXECUTE buttons
Frontend CHAINS tab - AUTO-EXECUTE shows progress pipeline with step indicators (S1, S2, S3, S4)
Frontend CHAINS tab - after execution completes shows CHAIN EXECUTION COMPLETE message
Frontend CHAINS tab - PREPARE (MANUAL) creates execution in ready state, shows [RUN] buttons per step
Frontend CHAINS tab - [RUN] buttons execute individual steps and show COMPLETED status
Frontend CHAINS tab - copy command button works on each command

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all UI elements working after bug fix)

seed_data_creation: None required - Attack chains are predefined in AttackChainEngine class
context_for_next_testing_agent: Chain Execution Engine P1 feature fully tested and working. Auto-execute mode runs background tasks with asyncio.sleep delays between commands (1s) and steps (0.5s). Frontend polls every 1.5s during auto-execute. Manual mode creates execution in 'ready' state with [RUN] buttons per step. Fixed bug where chainExecution.id was undefined - API returns execution_id field. All 6 chains work: web_to_shell, smb_to_domain, kerberos_attack, linux_privesc, windows_privesc, phishing_to_shell.

mocked_apis.note: Tools (nmap, sqlmap, etc.) return simulated results. Metasploit returns simulated=True. This is expected behavior as documented.

chain_execution_features_verified.auto_execute_mode: Background execution with step tracking, progress updates, completion detection
chain_execution_features_verified.manual_mode: Ready state creation, [RUN] buttons per step, individual step execution
chain_execution_features_verified.progress_tracking: step_statuses dict with pending/running/completed states, progress percentage
chain_execution_features_verified.step_indicators: Visual pipeline showing S1 > S2 > S3 > S4 with status colors
chain_execution_features_verified.completion_message: CHAIN EXECUTION COMPLETE displayed after all steps finish
